name: Hot Pasta Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter and combine with heavy cream, grated Reggiano Parmesan, salt, and black pepper.
2. Stir until all ingredients are melted and smooth.
3. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
4. Cook angel hair or linguine according to package instructions, then toss with steamed vegetables (sliced carrots, broccoli, cauliflower, zucchini, yellow squash, snap peas, snow peas, red bell pepper).
5. For a decorative effect, cut each slice of carrot and zucchini into flower shapes before serving.
6. Serve the pasta hot in large scallop shells as an appetizer.
